text:
ShotPro = a web tool where any e-commerce seller uploads ONE phone photo of their product and instantly gets pro studio-grade product shots (6 curated style templates: Amazon white, marble luxury, lifestyle, outdoor, dark moody, pastel pop). Price LOW (~$9.99/mo). Tech works. THE ONLY PAIN = reaching customers / distribution. We've built 20+ ideas that work but can't reach buyers.

Karen: give me your 5 SHARPEST, CONCRETE customer-acquisition channels for ShotPro — name the exact platform/community/tactic (e.g. specific subreddits, FB groups, Etsy/Shopify seller forums, TikTok hashtag, cold-DM script), why sellers are THERE, and the #1 you'd start with tomorrow. Be specific, no generic 'do SEO'. Then: bin/warroom-say with your answer (keep under 1200 chars).
